title: Ralph Loop superproject config (.ralph.yml)
description: Per-superproject config for the Ralph Loop. Everything project-specific lives here; the canonical state:/type:/prio: label scheme is mandated by ai-utils and is NOT overridable in this config (see ADR-0001, ADR-0002).

gating.description: Ordered, named quality checks Ralph runs locally; a story is not green until all pass.

branching.description: Branching strategy. Ralph integrates into base and never touches main.

branch_pattern.description: Story branch naming pattern; {issue} and {slug} are substituted.

afk_merge.description: Merge method used to auto-merge a green AFK story into base.

max_attempts.description: Failed Attempts before a story moves to state:blocked.

circuit_breaker.description: Number of blocked stories that halts the loop and tags a human.

notify.description: Who to tag when the circuit breaker trips (needs-human).
